personal.bio: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with experience in building scalable web applications across multiple ecosystems. As an AXSOS Academy graduate, I have mastered the MERN stack, Java Spring Boot, and Python Django. I thrive on solving complex problems and bridging the gap between robust backend logic and elegant frontend design.

experience.description: Intensive bootcamp (+600 coding hours) mastering three technology stacks. Developed multiple full-stack projects using Agile methodologies, focusing on data structures and clean code.
Focusing on Software Engineering, Database Systems, and Algorithms. Applying academic principles to real-world web development challenges.
